mapper.select: select business_type,order_code,status,sub_status,pay_amount,pay_time,finish_time,refund_time,create_time from bu_order where status = 5 and business_type in ('distribute', 'writeoff') and update_date between DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 1 day), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00') and DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')

select * from bu_order where
order_code in
#{item}
1 <> 1
and status in
#{item}
and 1 <> 1
select * from bu_order where user_id = #{userId} and status in (1, 3, 4, 5) and business_type = 'groupmeal' order by create_time limit 1
select b.* from bu_group_meal_order a join bu_order b on a.order_code = b.order_code where a.user_id = #{userId} and b.status = 5 order by a.plan_delivery_time_begin desc limit 1
